name: Green Bean and Radish Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 pound green beans, cut diagonally into 2-inch pieces
1/4 cup balsamic vinegar or 3 tablespoons red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook beans in a large pot of boiling salted water until beans are crisp-tender, about 5 minutes.
2. Drain the beans and rinse under cold water to cool them down.
3. Dry the beans using clean towels.
4. Chill the beans.
5. Combine beans and radishes in a large bowl.
6. Whisk the remaining ingredients together in a small bowl to blend.
7. Add enough dressing to the beans and radishes to season to taste.
8. Season with salt and pepper as desired and serve.
